summary: The issue causing the N+1 query explosion was that each resolver constructed its own DataLoader, preventing per-request batching. I updated the GraphQL context to instantiate DataLoader instances once per request via `createLoaders`, exposed them on the context, and refactored both the user and post resolvers to reuse these shared loaders. After rerunning `test.sh`, all functional checks passed and total query count dropped to 2, well within the threshold.
